name: background
description: | Use when the user wants to see, inspect, cancel, or prune background agents fired during prior chain runs. Read/manage `.hyperflow/background/registry.json` and the per-agent output buffers at `.hyperflow/background/<id>.md`. Standalone — never auto-invoked. Trigger with /hyperflow:background, "list background agents", "what's running in background", "cancel background agent", "show background result".
author: jeremylongshore
